name: dotclaude
description: Authors a custom .claude/ for your project — UX audit, a11y, design tokens, code review, data integrity — tuned to your actual stack. Not generic templates.

plugins.name: dotclaude
plugins.description: Most Claude Code plugins paste fixed templates. dotclaude authors a custom .claude/ for your project — UX audit agents, a11y, design tokens, code review, data integrity — derived from your actual stack, named benchmarks, and past failure modes. Slash commands: /dotclaude:design (showpiece), /dotclaude:coding, /dotclaude:planning, /dotclaude:testing, /dotclaude:data, /dotclaude:ai-workflow, /dotclaude:init.
